author: doll-agent
content: Audit + targeted follow-ups. PolynomialF32 (power basis) already ships in power_f32.rs with the full surface (11 unit tests, conversion helpers to/from f64 Polynomial). The bigger story — f32 for the other 5 bases (Chebyshev, Hermite, HermiteE, Legendre, Laguerre) and complex coefficients — is best landed via either (a) sibling F32 types per basis, or (b) genericizing the Poly trait over T: Float. Both paths are filed as concrete follow-ups (#725-#731) so the work is tracked rather than left as an unscoped epic. Closing #475 since the strict claim 'no f32 support exists' is no longer accurate.
